title: B1 Listening Part 1 - Test 38
instructions: For each question, listen to the recording and choose the correct answer: A, B or C.

items.context: You hear two friends talking about lost glasses.
items.audio_script: Girl: Have you found your glasses? You looked worried earlier. || Boy: Not at first. I searched the kitchen because I remembered using them there, then checked the garden bench, but nobody had seen them. || Girl: So where did they turn up? || Boy: My mum has just messaged me. [1]They are inside their case in the car[/1]. I must have left them there. I will collect them at lunch because I need them for reading in class. || Girl: Great. You can stop searching now and concentrate on the day.
items.question: Where are the glasses?

options.B: Inside their case in the car

items.explanation: The speaker says the glasses are inside their case in the car.

items.context: You hear two friends talking about buying a birthday present.
items.audio_script: Woman: Did you buy a birthday present for my teammate? You said you were going into town after school. || Man: Yes, but choosing took a while. I first considered a sports bag, because that seemed a safe choice. || Woman: What about a sweatshirt? That might have been useful. || Man: I looked at that, but it did not seem right. In the end, [2]I bought a reusable water bottle because she keeps forgetting drinks at practice[/2]. || Woman: That sounds thoughtful. I am sure it will be appreciated. || Man: I hope so. I will wrap it this evening before tomorrow's party.
items.question: What did the speaker buy?
items.explanation: The speaker says they bought a reusable water bottle because she keeps forgetting drinks at practice.

items.context: You hear two people talking about a part-time job at the pet shop.
items.audio_script: Girl: What job are you doing at the pet shop this afternoon? I thought you were going to clean the window. || Boy: That was yesterday's plan, but somebody finished it before lunch. || Girl: So will you carry food boxes instead? || Boy: No, the manager says that is not needed today. [3]I have to fill the animals' food bowls because feeding time is before closing[/3]. || Girl: That sounds manageable, although you may be busy. || Boy: Yes, I want to finish before five because I promised to meet my friends afterwards nearby.
items.question: What job will the speaker do?
items.explanation: The speaker says they have to fill the animals' food bowls because feeding time is before closing.

items.context: You hear two students talking about what to take on the science museum trip.
items.audio_script: Girl: Are you ready for the science museum trip tomorrow? I was checking what we have to bring, because I do not want to forget anything. || Boy: I was going to pack a packed lunch. Do we need that? || Girl: No, it is not on the list. || Boy: Perhaps I should take a camera instead. || Girl: You can, but [4]everyone must bring a notebook because you must write down answers during the visit[/4]. || Boy: Thanks for reminding me. I will put it in my bag tonight, so I am ready when we leave.
items.question: What must the student take?
items.explanation: The speaker says everyone must bring a notebook because you must write down answers during the visit.

items.context: You hear two friends making plans.
items.audio_script: Woman: Are we still planning to go to the beach during the holiday? I had already arranged everything for it. || Man: I am afraid not. The weather is poor and the castle has a new tour, so that plan will not work now. || Woman: We could go shopping instead. Would that be easier? || Man: I thought about that, but I have a better idea. [5]Let us visit the castle during the holiday instead[/5]. || Woman: Fine with me. Where shall we meet? || Man: Meet me by the bus stop at four, and bring your student card in case they ask for it.
items.question: What will they do?
items.explanation: The speaker suggests that they visit the castle during the holiday instead.

items.context: You hear two students talking about dance rehearsal.
items.audio_script: Girl: Do you know where dance rehearsal is being held today? I was going to the music room, where we usually meet. || Boy: Do not go there. The sports hall floor is wet and the drama studio has mirrors, so the organiser changed the room. || Girl: I wondered whether it might be in the sports hall. || Boy: No, that is not right either. [6]We need to meet in the drama studio this afternoon[/6]. || Girl: Thanks for telling me. I would have waited in the wrong place. || Boy: I will message the others too, so nobody misses the beginning.
items.question: Where will dance rehearsal be held?
items.explanation: The speaker says they need to meet in the drama studio.

items.context: You hear two students talking about choosing a book.
items.audio_script: Woman: Have you chosen a book from the library yet? I thought you wanted the travel guide for your holiday. || Man: I did, but there were no copies left on the shelf. || Woman: What about the sports biography? I remember you liked that one. || Man: I have read it already. [7]I chose the mystery story because the travel guide was out and I have read the biography[/7]. || Woman: That sounds like a good choice for the weekend. || Man: Yes, I can start it on the train tomorrow, and I will return it next week.
items.question: Which book will the speaker borrow?
items.explanation: I chose the mystery story because the travel guide was out and I have read the biography.
